summary: Added Stop hook + phase-state file + loopback cap to prevent pipeline from dropping later phases
Reconstructed maxTurns timeline (8→12 in 2.7.3, 100 plugin-only in 2.7.4, 8/10/12 in 2.7.5); identified bounded budget as a forcing function for leaf-worker / write-first contract

Deliberate reversal of v2.7.5 bounded-budget design: every specialist maxTurns→150 (ceiling not target); audit predicate + test bound updated; first decision-log entry written; prompt-side write-first rules now carry forcing-function load

Deleted xlfg/ Python package (13 files, ~4700 LoC), pyproject.toml, /xlfg-audit and /xlfg-init commands, docs/benchmarking.md, evals/intent/; stripped CLI wording from commands and phase skills; test suite pruned to ~20 shape tests; version tracking moved to plugin.json manifests
